category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Japan market.

title.en: China-to-Japan LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入日本：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入日本：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Japan's DENAN (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act) PSE marking (diamond / round), JIS C 8105 / JIS C 8155 luminaire standards, the Top Runner Program for LED energy efficiency, J-Moss (JIS C 0950) hazardous-substance marking, and VCCI EMC requirements versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与日本 DENAN（电气用品安全法）PSE 标志（菱形 / 圆形）、JIS C 8105 / JIS C 8155 灯具标准、LED 能效 Top Runner（领跑者）计划、J-Moss（JIS C 0950）有害物质标识及 VCCI 电磁兼容要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與日本 DENAN（電氣用品安全法）PSE 標誌（菱形 / 圓形）、JIS C 8105 / JIS C 8155 燈具標準、LED 能效 Top Runner（領跑者）計劃、J-Moss（JIS C 0950）有害物質標識及 VCCI 電磁兼容要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Japanese law (DENAN / Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act), JIS standards, Top Runner energy efficiency targets, PSE category designations, J-Moss substance lists, and VCCI / Giteki obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行日本法律（DENAN／电气用品安全法）、JIS 标准、Top Runner 能效目标、PSE 类别认定、J-Moss 物质清单及 VCCI／Giteki 义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行日本法律（DENAN／電氣用品安全法）、JIS 標準、Top Runner 能效目標、PSE 類別認定、J-Moss 物質清單及 VCCI／Giteki 義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Japan market must comply with the DENAN (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act): determine whether the product is a Specified product (requiring the diamond ◇ PSE mark via third-party certification by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body such as JET or JQA) or a Non-specified product (round ◯ PSE via self-declaration with self-testing); meet the applicable JIS technical standards (JIS C 8105 series for luminaires, JIS C 8155 for general lighting LED modules and lamps); satisfy Top Runner Program energy-efficiency targets for LED lamps and luminaires; apply J-Moss (JIS C 0950) hazardous-substance marking (orange / green) where in scope; meet VCCI EMC requirements for emissions; obtain MIC Giteki (技適) certification if the product incorporates radio (e.g. Wi-Fi / Bluetooth smart lighting); and account for Japan's 100/200 V, 50/60 Hz grid (different voltage and a split frequency versus China) — none of which is covered by existing CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 进入日本市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须遵守 DENAN（电气用品安全法）：判定产品属于特定电气用品（须经登记的合格评定机构（如 JET 或 JQA）第三方认证取得菱形 ◇ PSE 标志）还是非特定电气用品（经自我检验、自我声明取得圆形 ◯ PSE 标志）；满足适用的 JIS 技术标准（灯具适用 JIS C 8105 系列，通用照明 LED 模块及灯泡适用 JIS C 8155）；满足 Top Runner（领跑者）计划对 LED 灯泡及灯具的能效目标；在适用范围内贴附 J-Moss（JIS C 0950）有害物质标识（橙色／绿色）；若产品集成无线功能（如 Wi-Fi／蓝牙智能照明），取得 MIC Giteki（技适）认证；并考虑日本 100/200 V、50/60 Hz 电网（电压及分区频率均与中国不同）——上述均不被现有 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 進入日本市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須遵守 DENAN（電氣用品安全法）：判定產品屬於特定電氣用品（須經登記的合格評定機構（如 JET 或 JQA）第三方認證取得菱形 ◇ PSE 標誌）還是非特定電氣用品（經自我檢驗、自我聲明取得圓形 ◯ PSE 標誌）；滿足適用的 JIS 技術標準（燈具適用 JIS C 8105 系列，通用照明 LED 模組及燈泡適用 JIS C 8155）；滿足 Top Runner（領跑者）計劃對 LED 燈泡及燈具的能效目標；在適用範圍內貼附 J-Moss（JIS C 0950）有害物質標識（橙色／綠色）；若產品集成無線功能（如 Wi-Fi／藍牙智能照明），取得 MIC Giteki（技適）認證；並考慮日本 100/200 V、50/60 Hz 電網（電壓及分區頻率均與中國不同）——上述均不被現有 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Japanese regulator (METI), standards body (JISC / JSA), Registered Conformity Assessment Body (JET / JQA), VCCI, MIC, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Top Runner energy-efficiency targets, PSE Specified / Non-specified category designations, and J-Moss substance lists must be re-verified against current METI notices and the applicable JIS editions on each review cycle.

q.en: Which mark do LED luminaires and lamps need to enter the Japan market?
q.zh: LED灯具和灯泡进入日本市场需要哪种标志？
q.zht: LED燈具和燈泡進入日本市場需要哪種標誌？

a.en: Under the DENAN (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act), products are classified as Specified or Non-specified. Specified products require the diamond-shaped (◇) PSE mark obtained through third-party certification by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body such as JET or JQA, while Non-specified products carry the round (◯) PSE mark via manufacturer self-declaration with self-testing. The correct PSE category for a given LED lamp or luminaire depends on its construction and cap type, so the category designation must be verified against the current DENAN product lists.
a.zh: 根据DENAN（电气用品安全法），产品分为特定电气用品和非特定电气用品。特定电气用品须经JET或JQA等登记的合格评定机构进行第三方认证后取得菱形（◇）PSE标志，非特定电气用品则经制造商自我检验、自我声明取得圆形（◯）PSE标志。具体LED灯泡或灯具的PSE类别取决于其结构和灯头类型，故须依据现行DENAN产品清单核实类别认定。
a.zht: 根據DENAN（電氣用品安全法），產品分為特定電氣用品和非特定電氣用品。特定電氣用品須經JET或JQA等登記的合格評定機構進行第三方認證後取得菱形（◇）PSE標誌，非特定電氣用品則經製造商自我檢驗、自我聲明取得圓形（◯）PSE標誌。具體LED燈泡或燈具的PSE類別取決於其結構和燈頭類型，故須依據現行DENAN產品清單核實類別認定。

q.en: Does the PSE mark cover all compliance requirements for LED luminaires in Japan?
q.zh: PSE标志是否涵盖LED灯具在日本的所有合规要求？
q.zht: PSE標誌是否涵蓋LED燈具在日本的所有合規要求？

a.en: No. The PSE mark covers electrical safety under the DENAN, but the Top Runner energy-efficiency targets, J-Moss (JIS C 0950) hazardous-substance marking, and VCCI EMC requirements are separate obligations. If the luminaire incorporates radio (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth), MIC Giteki (技適) certification is additionally required. An importer of record established in Japan also bears notification and record-keeping duties under the DENAN.
a.zh: 不。PSE标志涵盖DENAN下的电气安全，但Top Runner能效目标、J-Moss（JIS C 0950）有害物质标识和VCCI电磁兼容要求属于独立义务。若灯具集成无线功能（Wi-Fi或蓝牙），还须取得MIC Giteki（技适）认证。在日本设立的进口商（进口事业者）还须承担DENAN下的申报及记录保存义务。
a.zht: 不。PSE標誌涵蓋DENAN下的電氣安全，但Top Runner能效目標、J-Moss（JIS C 0950）有害物質標識和VCCI電磁兼容要求屬於獨立義務。若燈具集成無線功能（Wi-Fi或藍牙），還須取得MIC Giteki（技適）認證。在日本設立的進口商（進口事業者）還須承擔DENAN下的申報及記錄保存義務。
